message:
Merge pull request #10555 from kubestellar/dependabot/github_actions/actions/setup-node-6.4.0

chore(deps): bump actions/setup-node from 4.1.0 to 6.4.0

files.patch:

       - name: Setup Node.js

+        uses: actions/setup-node@48b55a011bda9f5d6aeb4c2d9c7362e8dae4041e # v6.4.0
         with:
           node-version: '22'
